title: Guided vs. marketing agent empty states (campaigns, flows, forms)
summary: Which is associated with increased activation? Guided.
hypothesis: We believe that bringing back the pre-existing empty states for our guided workflows will increase activation because of past performance. We will measure success using activation, and monitor other metrics to ensure no negative impact.
notes: Marketing agent empty states were released in September as part of KBOS release, however, these were not experimented with. Since our prior empty states were such significant drivers of Activation, want to confirm that the MA logic added is not having any negative impact.
control_description: Sign-up forms, marketing agent empty state; this design treatment was also applied to campaigns and flows empty states

control_pages.caption: Forms empty state, marketing agent variant

treatment_description: Sign-up forms, guided empty state; this design treatment was also applied to campaigns and flows empty states

treatments.label: Treatment A
treatments.description: Sign-up forms, guided empty state; this design treatment was also applied to campaigns and flows empty states
